global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a mix of text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: The ad promotes trending content and encourages users to claim a reward.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'New hits every week', providing additional context.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large, semi-transparent circle and square overlap in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward', encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' appears in the top left corner, styled in white against the blue background.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is positioned in the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: This element is too small and unclear to determine its visual characteristics.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, trending content, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with a call to action at the bottom and logo in the top left.
